title: SovMCPlus
description: A Minecraft Fabric mod with many QoL features to make your SovereignMC experience better.
body:
## SovereignMC Plus

A Minecraft Fabric mod with many QoL features to make your SovereignMC experience better.

## Features

- Smooth chat animations that fade in and out seamlessly.
- Custom chat pings to alert players when they are mentioned.
- Command shortcuts for Lands, Quests, and Nation menus.
- Extra precautionary measures to prevent accidentally dropping items to other players or in dangerous situations.
- Improved safeguards for minecarts and player riding to prevent accidental dismounts. No more wasting resources or Gems on new minecarts!
- An easier way to locate player-made ChestShops. 

## Planned Features

- Chat tabs for Nation, Lands, Allies, and possibly direct messages.
- Automatic fly activation and deactivation when entering or leaving a land.
- Option to pin quests for easy viewing outside the quest menu.

## Requirements

- [Fabric Mod Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib)
